---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a skill improvement, new output field, or new integration
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that the skills do not yet support?

## Proposed change

What would the skill do differently? If it adds an output field, name it and
describe its shape.

## Scope check

- [ ] This is a single, bounded change (not a rewrite).
- [ ] If it touches Avatar Motion Forge output, it respects the originality gate.

## Alternatives considered
